settings.title: Settings
settings.invalidSvgFormat: Please upload a valid SVG file.
settings.invalidProjectPathPattern: Project skill path must strictly follow the format '.agent/skills'
settings.invalidProjectPath: Project skill path must be a relative path and cannot contain '..'
settings.githubMirrorNotice: Acceleration mirrors act as intermediaries. Only use for public repositories. If you have a VPN/proxy, you may not need this.
settings.modelAgentsHint: This block is for AI summary, quick read, and translation. For Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Gemini CLI tools, use Models.
settings.providerNone: None — choose a Claude or Codex provider from Models
settings.selectProviderHint: Choose a Claude or Codex provider from Models for summary and translation.
settings.aiProviderManagedHint: Base URL, API key, and model are reused directly from the Models provider.
settings.localApiKeyOptional: Optional — most local models don't need this
settings.baseUrlHintOpenai: OpenAI compatible: request will be sent to {base_url}/chat/completions
settings.baseUrlHintAnthropic: Anthropic format: request will be sent to {base_url}/v1/messages
settings.aiConcurrencyOverride: Adjust down if you encounter API rate limits (e.g. HTTP 429).
settings.ghCliDesc: Required for publishing cards to GitHub
settings.ghInstallCommandUnavailable: Could not detect this platform. Open the official install guide with the button above.
settings.updateFoundDesc: v{{version}} is available — check the sidebar to update
settings.storagePathModelHint: SkillStar uses two global roots: Data (config/history) and Hub (skills/repo cache).
settings.storagePathRelationIndependent: Relationship: Hub is an independent root path
settings.confirmForceDelete: Are you sure you want to force delete this storage? This operation cannot be undone.
settings.forceDeleteTimeoutHint: Still deleting {{target}} in the background. You can keep using the app.
settings.backgroundRunHint: Keep SkillStar running in the background to check for updates. New updates are only flagged, never automatically installed.
settings.acpDesc: Configure which ACP-compatible agent to use for generating setup hooks. The agent will analyze repositories and create build scripts automatically.
settings.acpCommandHint: The command to launch the ACP agent subprocess. Must support --acp or equivalent stdio mode.
settings.fingerprintsHint: Bind to Usage subscriptions to emulate TLS / HTTP headers
settings.devModeBannerTitle: Enable Developer Mode for Better Experience
settings.devModeBannerDesc: SkillStar is using junction points as a fallback. For full symlink support (including cross-drive project deployment), enable Windows Developer Mode.
settings.devModeBannerStepsWin10: Settings → Update & Security → For developers → Developer Mode → On
settings.devModeBannerStepsWin11: Settings → System → For developers → Developer Mode → On

mySkills.title: Cards
mySkills.empty: No cards installed yet. Visit the Marketplace to discover cards.
mySkills.selectionShortcutsHint: Selection mode: A select all · L link · U unlink · Enter deploy · Esc clear
mySkills.batchUninstallFailed: Failed to uninstall {{name}}, please try again.
mySkills.batchUninstallFailed_one: Failed to uninstall {{name}}, please try again.
mySkills.batchUninstallFailed_other: {{count}} cards failed to uninstall, please try again.

detailPanel.nonStreamingQuickReadNotice: This provider returned quick-read as a single response (no streaming deltas).
detailPanel.aiPromptHint: Configure AI to enable Quick Read.
detailPanel.specialHandlerHint: This skill comes from a built-in special repo workflow. SkillStar reruns the handler instead of using ACP migration.

marketplace.title: Cards Directory
marketplace.officialPublishersSubtitle: Skills from the companies that build the technology — the makers teaching you how to use their products.
marketplace.noResultsSearch: No cards found on skills.sh. Try a different query.
marketplace.aiSearchEmptyQuery: Please enter a search query first
marketplace.searchRemoteHint: No local matches yet. You can run one remote search and seed the snapshot.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.emptyDescription: Add one, then enable it for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and other tools.

mcp.importedNone: No new servers found to import
mcp.syncSuccess: Synced all MCP servers to their enabled tools
mcp.syncToolSkipped: {{toolId}} is not installed. The toggle was saved but no config was written.
mcp.drawerSubtitle: Edit once, then check tools to write their config files
mcp.drawerPresetSubtitle: Marketplace config is prefilled. Fill required secrets and choose tools before adding.
mcp.marketStatusSeeding: Loading from GitHub MCP Registry for the first time...
mcp.marketStatusRemoteError: Load failed. Check your network and try again.
mcp.marketEmptyTitle: No MCP servers available to browse
mcp.marketEmptyDescription: Refresh to seed the local snapshot from GitHub MCP Registry.
mcp.marketNoMatchesDescription: Try another keyword, or clear search to return to the full Registry.

projects.projectNoticeShared: These agents share the same project path. Avoid enabling them together in the same project:

projects.noAgents: No enabled agents. Turn on at least one agent in Settings.
projects.deployModeSymlinkHint: Live link to the hub (symlink or junction on Windows)
projects.deployModeCopyHint: Full folder copy — hub updates are not reflected until you re-apply

projects.importDone: Imported {{hub}} card(s) to hub, created {{links}} symlink(s)
projects.disambiguateDesc: The directory <1>{{path}}</1> exists in this project. Which agent should manage it?

launch.title: Launch
launch.openTerminalHint: Opens a terminal in this project and starts the assigned agent CLI.
launch.bannerNoClis: No agent CLI was detected (for example claude, codex, gemini, grok, opencode). Install one on your PATH, then reopen this project.

skillCard.incompatibleAgent: {{agent}} is not compatible with this skill

projectDeployDialog.title: Deploy Skills
projectDeployDialog.subtitle: Select the target agent configs for {{project}}.
projectDeployDialog.noEnabledAgents: No enabled agents available. Enable agents in Settings first.

githubImportModal.title: Import from GitHub
githubImportModal.description: Enter a GitHub repository URL to scan for cards
githubImportModal.fullDepthHint: Scan the full repository (default scan checks root and common skill directories first).
githubImportModal.noSkillsFound: No cards found in this repository.
githubImportModal.specialMatched: This repository is handled by {{handler}} inside SkillStar.
githubImportModal.specialFlowHint: SkillStar will run the repo's fixed setup command, collect the generated Codex-family skills, and install them as a managed group.

publishModal.title: Publish to GitHub
publishModal.pickRepoDesc: Select a repository to store the Card, or create a new one.
publishModal.description: Publish local Cards to a GitHub repository so they can be shared via Share Code.
publishModal.ghNotInstalledDesc: Publishing Cards requires GitHub CLI (gh). Please install it first:
publishModal.createNewRepoDesc: Create a new GitHub repository to store Cards
publishModal.descriptionHint: Shown below the repository title on GitHub, helps others understand what this repo is for.
publishModal.folderHint: Card will be stored as a subfolder with this name in the repository.
publishModal.nameInvalid: Only letters, digits and . - _ are allowed — no spaces or other symbols.
publishModal.invalidResponse: Publish failed: invalid response, please try again.

importShareCodeModal.description: Paste a share code or a complete share message. Missing cards will be auto-downloaded on deploy.
importShareCodeModal.shareCodePlaceholder: Paste share code or share message...
importShareCodeModal.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty if no password was set
importShareCodeModal.duplicateGroup: A deck named "{{name}}" already exists. Delete or rename it first.
importShareCodeModal.embeddedDesc: SKILL.md content for these cards has been restored directly from the share code.
importShareCodeModal.privateRepoDesc: Deploying will require GitHub access to clone these cards. Downloads will fail without permission.

exportShareCodeModal.title: Share Skills
exportShareCodeModal.description: Smart export: simple skills as share code, complex ones as bundle file.
exportShareCodeModal.descriptionDeck: Smart export: simple cards as share code, complex ones as bundle file.
exportShareCodeModal.embeddedDesc: No GitHub repo. SKILL.md content will be embedded directly in the share code.
exportShareCodeModal.bundleDesc: Too large or multi-file to embed. Will be exported as a downloadable bundle archive.
exportShareCodeModal.embeddedInfo: Contains embedded SKILL.md content, ready to use immediately.

uninstallDialog.description: Uninstalling removes the card from local storage. Symlinks synced to agents will also become invalid and require re-installation. Symlinks will also be removed.

importBundleModal.title: Import from File
importBundleModal.description: Import a .ags or .agd bundle file to install a card with all its files.
importBundleModal.conflictDesc: A card named "{{name}}" is already installed. Do you want to replace it?

importDeckBundleModal.title: Import Deck File
importDeckBundleModal.description: Import a .agd deck file to auto-install cards and create a deck.
importDeckBundleModal.conflictDesc: Some cards in this deck are already installed. Replace them?
importDeckBundleModal.successDesc: Imported {{count}} cards with {{files}} files. Deck created automatically.

skillEditor.title: SKILL.md Editor
skillEditor.translationMayTakeLong: Large skills may take a while — the bar reflects backend pipeline phases.

aiPickModal.title: AI Smart Pick
aiPickModal.description: Describe your project and AI will recommend the best matching cards from your installed collection.
aiPickModal.placeholder: Describe your project, e.g.: A Next.js e-commerce app with TypeScript, responsive design, and animations...
aiPickModal.resultEmpty: No matching cards found. Try a more detailed description.
aiPickModal.aiNotConfigured: Please configure an AI provider in Settings first

shareCodeImport.smartInputHint: Enter a GitHub URL or paste a share code (ags-... / agd-...)

shareCodeImport.alreadyDetected: {{count}} skills are already installed and will be skipped.
shareCodeImport.resultSummary: Requested {{total}} skills: already had {{existing}}, newly installed {{installed}}, skipped {{skipped}}.

emptyState.mySkillsDesc: No cards installed yet. Discover and install cards from the Marketplace to get started.
emptyState.projectsDesc: Register your project directory to start managing agent skills.

usage.pickProviderFromGrid: Click a provider card on the Usage page first, then finish setup here.
usage.pickProviderFromSidebar: Select a provider from the sidebar list first.
usage.switchCliSuccess: Set as active account and synced to CLI
usage.switchCliFailed: Set as active account, but CLI sync failed
usage.homeEmptyHint: The home view only shows bound subscriptions. Pick a provider in the sidebar (Cursor, Codex, …) to bind; it will appear here afterward.
usage.autoRenewLabel: Auto-renew (when checked, '{{label}}' shows next charge date)
usage.fieldApiKeyOptional: API Key (leave blank to keep current)
usage.glmApiKeyHint: GLM: paste token directly, no Bearer prefix needed
usage.deepseekPaygHint: Pay-as-you-go — API stops when balance runs out
usage.deepseekPlatformTokenHint: Sign in at platform.deepseek.com, then run the command below in DevTools. Powers model usage charts (unofficial API).
usage.deepseekPlatformTokenConfigured: Platform token saved. Leave blank to keep it; paste a new value to rotate.
usage.deepseekAnalyticsHint: Add a platform usage token to see V4 Flash / Pro consumption and a 7-day trend chart.
usage.deepseekAnalyticsPending: Platform token saved. Refresh this subscription to load usage charts.
usage.deepseekNoTrendData: No usage in the last 7 days
usage.oauthWaitingHint: SkillStar is listening for the auth callback and will refresh this subscription automatically.
usage.oauthPanelDesc: Generate a {{provider}} authorization link and finish sign-in in your browser. If the page does not return automatically, paste the code or full callback URL here.
usage.oauthLinkPlaceholder: The authorization link will appear here after generation.
usage.oauthCallbackPlaceholder: Paste the displayed code, or the full callback URL
usage.oauthCallbackHint: When only a code is pasted, SkillStar completes the local callback URL automatically.
usage.oauthCallbackRequired: Paste a callback URL or auth code first
usage.oauthDeviceCodeHint: After opening the login page, enter this code to authorize.
usage.importFromLocalHint: Reads Codex/Gemini CLI or Antigravity/Qoder IDE local credentials
usage.noUsageData: No usage data. Click edit to add.
usage.refreshOneCompletedWithIssue: {{name}} refreshed, but the provider returned an issue: {{error}}
usage.refreshOneNoVisibleData: {{name}} refreshed, but no displayable usage data was returned
usage.refreshOneNoVisibleDataWithReason: {{name}} refreshed, but no displayable usage data was returned: {{reason}}
usage.refreshPlanOnlyData: Plan {{plan}} was synced, but no displayable usage quota was returned.
usage.refreshCursorNoReadableData: Cursor returned successfully, but no quota fields were recognized. Cursor may have changed the response shape, this account may have no usage in the current period, or the account page may not expose usage data.
usage.refreshCursorPlanOnlyData: Cursor plan {{plan}} was synced, but the old OAuth endpoint did not return displayable usage quota; Cursor Dashboard now uses /api/dashboard/* endpoints that require a browser session.
usage.refreshNetworkTransportError: The network request did not go out or was interrupted. Check whether SkillStar's proxy or your system proxy can reach the provider, then retry.
usage.priorityUseHint: Quota resets soon — use it first
usage.includedUsageHint: Included AI usage in your plan
usage.categoryUsageHint: Share of each feature's quota used
usage.emptyUsageBanner: No subscriptions yet. Select a provider in the sidebar to bind.
usage.emptyUsageTip: Supports multiple auth modes: OAuth browser login, API Key, or manual entry.

hub.title: Model Workbench
hub.subtitle: Manage agent provider bindings and Claude Desktop MCP config in one place — all changes save automatically.
hub.connectHint: You have {{count}} providers but no agent is using one yet — pick a provider on a card below to connect.

card.missingEndpoint: This provider is missing an {{endpoint}}-compatible endpoint.
card.authFailed: Authentication failed — check the API key.

dialog.title: {{name}} connection settings
dialog.codexSubtitle: Written to ~/.codex/ (config.toml, auth.json) — shared by the CLI, desktop app and IDE extensions
dialog.envKeyHint: Write to ~/.zshrc in one click, or copy the command below manually. Restart Codex after writing. Codex reads the key from the environment variable, so your ChatGPT OAuth login stays untouched.
dialog.envKeyMissing: This provider has no API key set. Add one in the provider editor first.
dialog.zshrcHint: or copy the command above manually
dialog.zshrcWritten: Written to ~/.zshrc. Restart Codex to apply.
dialog.codexSuboptimalTitle: This config may cause Codex calls to fail
dialog.codexSuboptimalHint: For this provider's URL, the recommended combination is {{wireApi}} + {{authMode}}. Apply it to avoid auth or endpoint incompatibilities.

appAi.title: In-app AI
appAi.tagline: Summaries · translation · skill picks (independent of CLI agents)
appAi.pickHint: Pick a provider below and bind by protocol:

desktop.tagline: Anthropic's official desktop app · only MCP servers are configurable
desktop.mcpUsage: Connect the filesystem, Git, custom tools and more via the MCP protocol.
desktop.mcpEmpty: No MCP servers added yet — click below to edit the config.
desktop.noBindingBody: Claude Desktop signs in with your Claude.ai account and talks to Anthropic's official endpoint — it does not accept third-party API keys or a custom base URL.
desktop.aboutMcpDesc: — lets Claude Desktop use the filesystem, Git, Notion, custom MCP tools and more.
desktop.aboutNotDesc: base URL / API key / model — Claude Desktop always signs in with a Claude.ai account and connects to Anthropic's official endpoint.
desktop.aboutCustomBefore: Want a custom provider or model? Use the "Claude" (Claude Code CLI) agent — it supports
desktop.noServersHint: No MCP servers added yet. Click "Insert example" below for a filesystem server template.
desktop.parseError: Failed to parse JSON — fix the syntax.

drawer.createSubtitle: Pick a preset → enter the key → continue to detailed setup
drawer.subtitle: Connection · Models · Advanced · Diagnostics

connectionTab.name: Name
connectionTab.openaiEndpointHint: Used by Codex / OpenCode / Gemini CLI
connectionTab.modelsUrlHint: Used by the fetch action on the Models tab

modelsTab.title: Model list
modelsTab.empty: No models fetched or added yet
modelsTab.fetchRequirement: Fill in the model list URL and API key first (Connection tab)
modelsTab.addPlaceholder: Type a model id and press Enter

preset.categoryOfficialHint: Official endpoint preset — just add an API key
preset.categoryDomesticHint: Official endpoint preset — just add an API key
preset.categoryRelayHint: Relay services with unified access to many models
preset.categoryCompatibleHint: Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint — enter the base URL manually
preset.fillKeyHint: Enter an API key to create the provider
preset.afterCreateHint: After creating you'll stay in this drawer to configure models and agent bindings.

deleteDialog.withAgents: Deleting will disconnect {{agents}}. This cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.noAgents: No agent is currently using this provider. This cannot be undone.

gallery.emptyTitle: Connect your first agent in three steps

configFiles.pushTitle: Overwrite managed fields with the current binding

conflicts.externalModified: The config file was modified externally after the last sync.

conflicts.envVarWarning: ⚠️ Environment variable {{name}} may override config file settings

diagnosticsPanel.needCredentials: Enter an API key and at least one endpoint URL to test
diagnosticsPanel.proxyHint: Tests go through the system proxy from Settings. On timeouts or failures, enable a local proxy (e.g. Clash) under Settings → Proxy first.

toasts.savedButSyncFailed: Provider saved, but tool sync failed: {{names}}
toasts.syncedFromProvider: Synced from provider to config file

sidebar.intro: Agent bindings, provider management and diagnostics now live in the main panel.

ssh.title: Remote Skill Management
ssh.subtitle: Connect to remote servers and push / manage skills
ssh.noHostsHint: Create an SSH connection to start pushing skills
ssh.noAgents: No agent skill directories found on the remote host
ssh.hubPushNote: Pushes content to ~/.skillstar/hub/content and symlinks into the selected agent folder

drawer.hubHint: Managed on the server like local SkillStar: hub content plus symlink into the agent skills directory.

ssh.hostKeyMismatch: Server fingerprint does not match the saved one — possible MITM

console.title: Connection console
console.empty: Selecting a host shows the connection steps here
console.hostKeyPrompt: First connection — verify the server fingerprint

ssh.migrateConfirm: Move {{name}} into ~/.skillstar/hub/content and replace the agent entry with a symlink?
ssh.migrationBanner: {{count}} skill(s) are not under ~/.skillstar yet — migrate so the server matches local SkillStar layout.
ssh.selectHost: Select a host on the left

bulkMigrate.title: Unify remote skill layout
bulkMigrate.body: {{count}} skill(s) on this server are not under ~/.skillstar yet. Migrate them once to match your local SkillStar layout.

s3.emptyHint: Add an S3-compatible target (Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, MinIO, 七牛云…) to sync skills across devices.
s3.securityNotice: The secret access key is stored in your OS keyring — it never touches the config file. Deleting a target clears its keyring entry.
s3.manifestEmpty: No skills in the cloud manifest yet. Push your local skills to create one.
s3.manifestError: Could not read the cloud manifest. Check the target and try pulling again.
s3.selectTarget: Select a cloud target on the left
s3.selectTargetHint: Configure a target in Settings → Cloud Sync.

form.endpointHint: Leave blank for AWS S3. Required for R2 / MinIO / 七牛 / OSS.
form.prefixHint: Object key prefix inside the bucket (e.g. skillstar/).
form.secretHintExisting: Leave blank to keep the stored key.
form.forcePathHint: Required for MinIO and some on-prem services.
